seoTitle: Mollerin vs Molloy Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mollerin and Molloy Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mollerin vs Molloy Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mollerin and Molloy Island.
heading: Mollerin vs Molloy Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mollerin, Western Australia and Molloy Island, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Molloy Island has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Mollerin (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mollerin or Molloy Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mollerin has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Molloy Island scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mollerin scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Molloy Island scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mollerin or Molloy Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Molloy Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
